summary: Plan-only classification for five independent open PRs. No merge actions are recommended because the artifact lacks complete merge preflight proof, including Codex /review and resolved comment/review-bot evidence. #93830 has a concrete repair path for failing lint/type checks; #89762 and #93599 need scoped maintainer decisions before automation should proceed.

actions.reason: Independent focused PR; keep in normal PR review lane until merge preflight is complete.
Needs maintainer product/compatibility judgment before automation finalizes a cross-cutting config and session-state behavior change.
Independent focused provider compatibility fix; keep in normal PR review lane until merge preflight is complete.
Needs maintainer decision on whether to split or narrow the branch before Clownfish repair/merge automation preserves the contributor work.
Repair the contributor branch for failing lint/type checks, then rerun validation and Codex /review before any merge consideration.

needs_human: #89762 requires maintainer product/compatibility judgment for a cross-cutting config-level responseUsage default and session-state behavior change.
#93599 requires maintainer scope judgment because the branch mixes the hallucinated-extension fix with unrelated-looking WhatsApp/Slack/channel changes.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair #93830 on the contributor branch so the Matrix reasoning m.notice fix can be considered after failing lint/type checks are resolved and merge preflight is complete.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(matrix): repair reasoning notice delivery checks
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Clownfish repair plan for #93830.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93830 by @ml12580. This keeps the contributor's Matrix reasoning-block delivery fix as the canonical implementation path and preserves attribution.

Scope:
- keep reasoning blocks delivered to Matrix as m.notice when /reasoning is enabled
- fix the failing check-lint and check-prod-types results from the hydrated preflight artifact
- avoid unrelated Matrix, auto-reply, or channel behavior changes

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/handler.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/replies.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review before merge, with all findings addressed
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for ml12580 and PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93830.
If a replacement PR is needed after branch repair fails, name #93830 as the source PR and carry attribution in the PR body/changelog note.
needs_human: #89762 requires maintainer product/compatibility judgment for a cross-cutting config-level responseUsage default and session-state behavior change.
#93599 requires maintainer scope judgment because the branch mixes the hallucinated-extension fix with unrelated-looking WhatsApp/Slack/channel changes.
